title: alchemilla hybrida var. plicata
intro: Alchemilla hybrida var. plicata, also known as the Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla hybrida var. plicata include soothing and calming effects, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat various skin conditions, as well as internally to support overall well-being.
